detail.instructions: Implement From<ParseIntError> for ParseUserError by returning ParseUserError::InvalidId(error). Then use ? for the ID parse in parse_user.

hints.body: From<T> defines fn from(value: T) -> Self.
The body only needs to wrap the ParseIntError in the InvalidId variant.
This conversion lets parse_user use ? instead of spelling out map_err at the call site.

detail.completionExplanation: From centralizes the low-level to high-level error conversion. Call sites can ask for ParseUserError without rewriting the wrapping logic each time.
